success.description: Name one attribute, such as a characteristic, fatigue, stress, health (wounds), mental health (insanity), purity (corruption), or fortune points. You "steal" one of that attribute from your target. This lasts until the end of the encounter

chaosStar.description: When the blessing's effect ends, you lose 1 of that attribute until the next sunset

sigmarsComet.description: If you stole fatigue, stress, health, or purity, It is permanent.

success.description: Name one attribute, such as a characteristic, fatigue, stress, health (wounds), mental health (insanity), purity (corruption), or fortune points. You "steal" one of that attribute from your target. This lasts until the end of the encounter
As above, but "steal" 2 of that attribute from your target instead
